SEARCH
Package hu.bme.mit.theta.btor2.frontend.dsl.gen

Interface Btor2Listener

All Superinterfaces:
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
All Known Implementing Classes:
Btor2BaseListener
public interface Btor2Listener extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
This interface defines a complete listener for a parse tree produced by Btor2Parser.
